ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the stock data was updated */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock symbol */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price */,
  "dividends" REAL /* Dividends paid */,
  "splits" REAL /* Stock splits */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the price data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock symbol */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the technical indicator */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the technical indicator */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the indicator */,
  "timeframe" TEXT /* Timeframe of the indicator (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the indicator data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_indicators_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moving_averages" (
  "ma_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moving average record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock symbol */,
  "ma_name" TEXT /* Name of the moving average */,
  "window" INTEGER /* Window size of the moving average */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the moving average */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the moving average */,
  "timeframe" TEXT /* Timeframe of the moving average (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the moving average data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ma_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moving_averages_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, investor) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date and time the user logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the user account was updated */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "last_failed_login" TEXT /* Last date and time a failed login attempt occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  "layout" TEXT /* Layout configuration of the dashboard */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the dashboard is publicly accessible */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the dashboard was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the dashboard was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "widgets" (
  "widget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each widget */,
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dashboard */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the widget */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the widget (e.g., chart, table, news feed) */,
  "position_x" INTEGER /* X-coordinate position of the widget on the dashboard */,
  "position_y" INTEGER /* Y-coordinate position of the widget on the dashboard */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the widget */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the widget */,
  "is_visible" INTEGER /* Indicates if the widget is visible */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the widget was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the widget was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("widget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_widgets_dashboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("dashboard_id") REFERENCES dashboards ("dashboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the news article */,
  "is_breaking" INTEGER /* Indicates if the news is breaking */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the news article was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used for the model */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date the model was last trained */,
  "accuracy_score" REAL /* Accuracy score of the model */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the model was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)
